name: Natural Opening Out Movement
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Natural Top, Rope Spinning, Three Alemanas
following_figure_names: Fan, Basic Movements: Closed, Basic Movements: Open, Natural Opening Out Movement, Closed Hip Twist, Spiral (1/4 R on 1)
notes: Note: Man is dancing a LF Cucaracha and RF Cucaracha. Turn on step 1 and 4 are made at end of previous beat. An Extended Forward Walk may be used on steps 3 & 6. Variations (Silver & Gold): Man may place R hand on Lady's back on 6, release L hand hold. Lady: place L hand on Man's R shoulder and turn 1/4 R into step 1 of following figure to 90 degree. Normal hold is regained on step 3 of following figure. Man may lead lady fwd towards his R side on last step of preceding figure and then turn 1/4 R on RF keeping his feet together, at the same time leading Lady to turn R. Lady LF fwd in line with RF towards Man's R side, then turn 1/2 R on LF to end LF back at a 90 degree angle to Man. No turn on step 1 of the following Opening Out Movement.

steps.action: step back at 90° angle to partner, turn 1/4 to right
comments: Turn started on & of previous beat

steps.action: step forward, then turn to side, 1/4 to left
comments: Delay putting hand on partner's shoulder
Regain normal hold at end of 6

steps.action: step back at 90° angle to partner, turn 1/4 to left
